mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, payment_time, amount, payment_method, account_number, status, remarks, image_voucher, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, COALESCE(del_flag, 0) as del_flag FROM gh_order_payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND (del_flag = 0 OR del_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY payment_time DESC, create_time DESC
